headline: Claire Brosseau 🍁💔 MAID 🍆💀 Mental ILLNESS FIGHT 💥⚖️
text: Claire Brosseau 🍁😂 comedian queen 🎭🌍 who once SLAYED stages 🏟️💃 now fights for her final MIC DROP 🎤💀! The 49-year-old Toronto queen 👑🇨🇦 says bipolar + PTSD 🍆🧠 are functionally TERMINAL 😭💔 after decades of BEATS from meds 💊🔥 shocks ⚡🧠 therapy 🛋️😴 – NOTHING WORKED 😩💦! She can't leave crib 🏠🚫 talk to fam 👨‍👩‍👧 or even vibe ☕💨 wants a SAFE DEATH 🛡️💀 no horrific self-exit ❌🔪! Canada 🇨🇦 DELAYED MAID twice for mental ILLNESS 🧠🚫 now weighing if it’s EVER gonna happen 🤔📅! Claire hits courts ⚖️👩‍⚖️ for exemption screaming STIGMA IS THE REAL CRIME ❌🧠 vs cancer patients who can just TAP OUT 💀🦠! Polls say Canadians ARE WITH HER 70%+ 👍💚 but committee clowns 🤡🎤 heard warnings: housing first 🏠💵 not death pills 💊😱! Dutch docs 🇳🇱📈 warn of suicide CONTAGION 🌊😱 while others say MAID is MERCY 🍃💧 for unbearable PAIN! Claire says she’s campaigning NOT for death but to be SEEN as FULL HUMAN 👀❤️ not a SUBCLASS 🤬! Parliament waits for report 📜🕰️ Mark Carney 🤵‍♂️ says he’ll take INFORMED POSITION 🧠📈 but Claire ain’t holding her breath 😤💨 cuz every dawn brings DREAD & ANXIETY 🌅😰! She wants EQUAL RIGHTS ⚖️✊ to the same exit ramp everyone else gets 🛣️💀! MAID for mental illness is the next BATTLEGROUND 🍆⚔️ and Claire’s ready to THROW DOWN 🥊🔥!
